business.name: Supreme Electric and Solar
business.tagline: Powering Dallas with Premium Electrical & Solar Solutions

seo.title: Best Electrician in Dallas, TX | Supreme Electric and Solar
seo.description: Top-rated electrician in Dallas, TX. Expert electrical repairs, panel upgrades, EV charger installation & solar. Call (214) 876-0575 for fast, reliable service.

hero.headline: Expert Electrical & Solar Services for Your Home or Business
hero.subheadline: From minor repairs to full solar installations, we deliver safe, code-compliant work with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Electrical Solutions
featureSections.body: Whether you need a quick outlet repair or a complete home rewiring, our licensed electricians handle it all. We also specialize in EV charger installation and energy-efficient lighting upgrades.
featureSections.cardBody: Every job is backed by liability insurance and a workmanship guarantee, so you can rest easy.

featureSections.title: Solar Panel Installation & Battery Backup
featureSections.body: Reduce your carbon footprint and slash energy bills with our custom solar solutions. We handle design, permitting, and installation for residential and commercial properties.
featureSections.cardBody: Take advantage of federal incentives and start saving from day one.

home.whyTitle: Why Dallas Homeowners Choose Supreme Electric

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Fully licensed in Texas and insured for your protection. We never cut corners on safety.

whyChooseUs.title: Upfront Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees or surprise charges. You'll get a clear estimate before any work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Response Times
whyChooseUs.description: Same-day service available for emergencies. We respect your time and arrive within the window.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Workmanship Guarantee
whyChooseUs.description: If you're not satisfied, we'll make it right. Our reputation depends on your happiness.

testimonials.quote: They rewired our entire home and were incredibly professional. The team showed up on time, kept everything clean, and the price was fair.

testimonials.quote: We had a faulty panel that kept tripping. They diagnosed the issue fast and replaced it same day. Peace of mind is priceless.
testimonials.author: James R.

cta.headline: Ready to Power Up Your Property?
cta.subheadline: Call us or fill out the form for a free, no-obligation estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From simple fixes to full-scale solar installations, Supreme Electric and Solar delivers expert electrical services across Dallas. Our licensed electricians use top-tier materials and follow strict safety codes to ensure lasting results.

services.title: Electrical Repairs & Troubleshooting
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable fixes for outlets, switches, breakers, and more.
services.longDescription: Our experienced electricians diagnose and repair any electrical issue, from flickering lights to dead outlets and tripping breakers. We use advanced testing equipment to pinpoint problems quickly, saving you time and money. Every repair is performed to the highest safety standards.
benefits: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
All work guaranteed for your peace of mind

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect the issue and explain the cause in plain English.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Our technicians make the repair using quality parts and proven techniques.

process.title: Test & Verify
process.description: We test everything to ensure it's working safely and efficiently.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service for urgent issues. Call us and we'll prioritize your job.

faqs.question: Do you charge for estimates?
faqs.answer: No, we provide free, no-obligation estimates for all repair work.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Modernize your electrical system for safety and capacity.
services.longDescription: Older panels can be a fire hazard and limit your home's electrical capacity. We upgrade to modern, code-compliant panels that handle today's demands—from home offices to EV chargers. Our team handles permits and inspections for a seamless experience.
benefits: Increased safety and reduced fire risk

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current panel and load requirements.

process.title: Permitting
process.description: We secure all necessary permits from the city.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team installs the new panel and tests the entire system.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most residential upgrades are completed in one day.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit for a panel upgrade?
faqs.answer: Yes, and we handle all permitting and inspection coordination for you.

services.title: EV Charger Installation
services.shortDescription: Level 2 chargers installed fast, with full support.
services.longDescription: Drive electric? We install Level 2 EV chargers for all makes and models. Our electricians ensure proper wiring, breaker sizing, and code compliance. We'll help you choose the right charger and location for your home or business.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vehicle, driving habits, and ideal charger location.

process.title: Site Assessment
process.description: We check your panel capacity and run conduit if needed.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We mount the charger, connect wiring, and test operation.

faqs.question: Can you install any brand of EV charger?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install Tesla, ChargePoint, JuiceBox, and all major brands.

faqs.question: How long does installation take?
faqs.answer: Most installations take 2-4 hours. Complex setups may take longer.

services.title: Solar Panel Installation
services.shortDescription: Custom solar systems that slash your energy bills.
services.longDescription: Go solar with confidence. We design and install custom photovoltaic systems for homes and businesses. From roof assessment to interconnection, we manage the entire process. Our systems come with industry-leading warranties and monitoring capabilities.
benefits: Reduce electricity bills by up to 70%

process.title: Design
process.description: We create a custom solar layout based on your roof and energy needs.

process.title: Permitting & Approval
process.description: We handle all paperwork with the city and utility company.

process.title: Installation & Activation
process.description: Our crew installs panels and inverter, then connects to the grid.

faqs.question: How long does a solar installation take?
faqs.answer: Most residential installations are completed in 1-3 days after permits are approved.

faqs.question: What if my roof is old or needs repair?
faqs.answer: We can coordinate roof repairs or replacement before solar installation to ensure a solid foundation.

about.headline: Dallas's Premier Electrical & Solar Company
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and energy-efficient electrical solutions that exceed expectations while treating every customer like family.
story: Supreme Electric and Solar was founded on the belief that quality electrical work shouldn't come with a premium attitude. Our owner, a licensed master electrician with over 15 years in the trade, started the company to offer Dallas homeowners and businesses a better choice: transparent pricing, punctual service, and workmanship that stands the test of time. What began as a one-truck operation has grown into a trusted team serving thousands of satisfied customers across the metroplex.

Today, we're proud to be a leading provider of electrical repairs, panel upgrades, EV charger installations, and solar energy systems. Our commitment to continuing education and code compliance means every job is done right the first time. We give back to the community through free safety inspections for seniors and sponsorships of local youth sports teams. At Supreme Electric, we're not just electricians—we're your neighbors.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety. Every job follows strict protocols to protect you and your property.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest recommendations, transparent pricing, and no shortcuts. We do what we say.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.description: We stay ahead of the curve with the latest tools, techniques, and energy solutions.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve and support the Dallas community that has supported us.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Supreme Electric and Solar
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out the form for a free estimate.
